title: Desire Pack
description: Enhances the default look of tools and armor with high-quality textures and unique details.
body:
High-quality PvP pack for 1.21
Created by desire222

# 💎 Features
- 🌟 Custom 3D totem and crystal
- 🖼️ Custom Hud
- 🗡️ Custom Spear
- 🔥 Low fire for better visibility
- 🔎 Small items for better PvP
- 🌌 Epic custom sky (Requires Mod)
- 💥 No explosion particles
- ✨ Better hit particles
# ⚙ Technical Info
- 🏹 Version 1.21.9 - 26.1.2
- 🖼️ Resolution 128x
# 📸 Screenshot
![screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ade0a85ab74f7e75e6e480ba3edfac47849a0bd6.png)
Higher quality available in the gallery

https://faithfulpack.net/

Project is based on the Faithful Resource Pack
